title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions:
Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
